Brittany needs to calculate her total shampoo usage for a leap year which has 366 days, and since she washes her hair every other day, she will wash it approximately 183 times using 1/4 ounce per wash. This results in a total consumption of 45.75 ounces, meaning she will need to purchase [number] bottles to cover the entire year because one bottle is insufficient.

To ensure she does not run out before the year ends, she must buy enough 14-ounce containers to exceed her 45.75 ounce requirement, which means purchasing [quantity] bottles is the correct solution for her specific routine.
